name: Mosaic

aliases.name: DisplayConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for the display of the mosaic.
aliases.type: { baseWidth : Basics.Int, baseHeight : Basics.Int, spacingSize : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Mosaic
aliases.comment: Display a mosaic with the given list of pictures.
aliases.type: { pictures : List.List Mosaic.Picture, modal : Mosaic.Modal, config : Mosaic.DisplayConfig, screenSize : { deviceWidth : Basics.Int, deviceHeight : Basics.Int } }

aliases.name: Picture
aliases.comment: Representation of an image in the mosaic.

values.name: defaultSizeConfig
values.comment: Default configuration for the mosaic display.

values.name: displayModal
values.comment:
Display a modal with the selected picture.

`inFront <| Mosaic.displayModal model.mosaic`

values.name: init
values.comment: Initialize a new Mosaic with the given display configuration and list of pictures.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Define subscriptions for the keyboard events.

values.name: takeFullscreenSize
values.comment: Take the fullscreen size of the mosaic.

values.name: update
values.comment:
Update the Mosaic model based on the received message.

    type Msg
        = MosaicMsg Mosaic.Msg
        | (...)

    update : Msg -> Model -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update msg model =
        case msg of
            MosaicMsg subMsg ->
                ( { model | mosaic = Mosaic.update subMsg model.mosaic }, Cmd.none )

    -- Handle other messages...

values.name: updateScreenSize
values.comment: Update the screen size in the Mosaic model.
values.type: { deviceWidth : Basics.Int, deviceHeight : Basics.Int } -> Mosaic.Mosaic -> Mosaic.Mosaic
